description.zh-Hans: 在两个图像输入之间，或在图像与常量值之间，执行逐像素数学运算。
description.en: Performs per-pixel mathematical operations between two image inputs or between an image and a constant value.

triggers.zh-Hans: 数学运算, 加减乘除, 混合模式, 图像运算, 逐像素运算
triggers.en: math, math operation, add, subtract, multiply, blend, pixel operation

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对两个输入图像进行乘法混合，叠加纹理效果。
exampleUsage.en: Multiply-blend two input images to overlay texture effects.
